hero.titulo: Autonomous technology to protect what matters most.
hero.subtitulo: We build drones, turrets and AI video surveillance systems designed to respond, not just observe.

diapositivas.descripcion: We process faces, vehicles, objects and weapons from any of the client's existing IP cameras.

diapositivas.titulo: Autonomous response from hangar to target.
diapositivas.descripcion: When the central system detects a threat, the drone deploys automatically and hands control to the operator.

diapositivas.titulo: Perimeter defense that doesn't wait for confirmation.
diapositivas.descripcion: 30 cm tall, swiveling camera and on-device processing: it spots a weapon or breached perimeter and acts.

barraEstadisticas.etiqueta: Human latency — the turret decides on the edge

manifiesto.titulo: Cameras of the past only watched. Ours act.
manifiesto.parrafo: AI Robotics is a Codeplex division dedicated to new technologies: devices that don't yet exist on the market, or that exist without the capabilities reality demands. Today we are building an AI surveillance system for municipalities and private companies, a defense drone that automatically launches from its hangar when a robbery is detected, and an autonomous turret that defends commercial premises without human confirmation.

productosDestacados.descripcion: Every product solves a different scenario, but they all share the same brain: computer vision trained to detect what traditional cameras miss.

items.descripcion: Processes the feed from any IP camera registered with GPS. When a criminal event is detected, it dispatches a drone to the location automatically.
puntos: Detection of faces, vehicles, objects and weapons
Automatic dispatch of the response drone
Hand-over to the operator for action assessment

items.descripcion: Leaves the hangar without manual input. Carries an integrated speaker for warnings, live transmission and an operator-authorized neutralization module.
puntos: Autonomous deployment in under a minute

items.descripcion: 30 × 20 cm. Swiveling camera with configurable sweep and on-device AI. If it detects a weapon or a breach of the perimeter fence during restricted hours, it acts.
puntos: Software-defined virtual perimeter fences and time windows
Built for warehouses, retail and critical zones

comoFunciona.titulo: From camera to drone, no human input until the final step.

pasos.descripcion: The system processes feeds from existing IP cameras and recognizes weapons, intrusions and aggressive behavior.
The signal reaches the central. The system dispatches the drone from its hangar and positions the camera over the target.
The operator receives the alert, evaluates the live scenario and authorizes — or cancels — the response.
The drone issues a deterrent warning through its speaker or, if needed, neutralizes the threat with the authorized module.

casosDeUso.titulo: Built for those who can't watch screens 24/7.

items.descripcion: Smart surveillance over the urban camera network. Aerial response to ongoing robberies.
Programmed drone patrols on extensive properties. Perimeter defense with autonomous turrets.
Virtual perimeter fences. Allowed time windows. Autonomous defense when the venue is closed.

ctaCierre.titulo: Let's design an autonomous defense scheme together.
ctaCierre.descripcion: Tell us what you protect and we'll design a demo in your own operational environment.
